---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for smelt
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is, e.g. "I'm always frustrated
when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen. If it's a new flag or config key, sketch what it
would look like.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions, workarounds, or existing flags that partially
solve this.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant -- links, examples from other tools, etc.
